name: archxray
description: X-ray your pull requests: architecture diff, guardrails, AI narration, and time-lapse — in one PR comment. Zero dependencies.

scripts.demo:diff: node bin/archxray.js diff --repo demo/shop-api --base main --head feature/analytics-refunds
scripts.demo:silent: node bin/archxray.js diff --repo demo/shop-api --base main~2 --head main~1
